projectDescription: A service that deploys Android apps to live browser-accessible URLs, driven by an AI coding agent.
keyFeatures: Deploy Android APKs to a live, shareable browser URL — no install required for viewers
AI agent-driven workflow: the agent installs the CLI, authenticates, and deploys
Compatible with any APK-producing engine: native Android, Unity, Godot, Unreal
Free plan activated with a one-time $0 card verification
nowrun skill and MCP server let agents self-discover all CLI commands
Dashboard for managing apps, links, versions, and plan
